# K-1 Custom

Custom car audio, window tinting, ceramic coating, vehicle wraps, and auto accessories. Family-owned shop in Orlando, FL since 2014.

## Business
- **Name:** K-1 Custom
- **Address:** 6647 Narcoossee Rd Suite 120, Orlando, FL 32822, USA
- **Phone:** (407) 440-3321
- **Email:** konecustom@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Monday to Saturday 9:00am - 6:00pm; Sunday closed
- **Founded:** 2014
- **Website:** https://www.k-1custom.com

## Service Area
Orlando, Lake Nona, Kissimmee, St. Cloud, Winter Park, Altamonte Springs, Sanford, Oviedo, and all of central Florida.

## Services
- Custom car audio & video systems (Sony, Pioneer, DB Drive, JL Audio)
- Window tinting with micro-edge precision film
- Paint correction & ceramic coating
- Vehicle wraps & paint protection film (PPF)
- Custom fiberglass enclosures & audio builds
- Remote start, car alarms, GPS tracking
- LED lighting, headlight upgrades
- Truck accessories, tonneau covers, roof racks
- Dash cameras, backup cameras, parking sensors
- Fleet & commercial vehicle services

## Guarantee
Every professional installation comes with a **lifetime workmanship warranty**.

## Financing
Snap Finance and Acima Credit available. Quick approval, flexible monthly payments, no perfect credit required.

## Brands Installed
Sony, Pioneer, Kenwood, Alpine, DB Drive, JL Audio, Rockford Fosgate, Compustar, Viper, Llumar window film, Ceramic Pro coatings.

## Why K-1 Custom
- Locally owned in Orlando since 2014
- Lifetime workmanship warranty on every install
- Top brand parts and films
- Honest, no-pressure quotes
- Financing available
- 5-star Google reviews
